case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS MORA MARIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,620.42 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT MORA MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORA MARIA $1,620.42 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,655.42 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,064.99 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MORA MARIA
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MORA MARIA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MORA MARIA
COMPARE AND/OR CERTIFY COPY OF ANY RECORD ON FILE FOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE
